name: Laraib Tabbassum
title: Full Stack Developer
summary: Full-stack developer with 2 years of experience building modern web applications using Next.js, React, and Python. Passionate about AI integration with hands-on expertise in Prompt Engineering, OpenAI SDK, and Google Gemini. Skilled in Specs-Driven Development (SDD) methodology and Claude CLI for building AI-powered applications. Focused on creating clean, responsive user interfaces with Tailwind CSS and TypeScript.
